Geologists found a 40 million year old RIVER under ANTARCTICA! 😮

Researchers say rising temperatures put us at risk of the same fate! 😟 

#ClimateChange #Antarctica

author.displayName: Canada Truth

images.alt:
Disinformation alert! As wildfires rage, disinfo spreads. 

These fires often start from campfires or other human error, and climate change makes them worse and more common.

Trolls, deniers, and comment farms often blame “arson” instead, as a way to deflect.

Defend Truth: When you see disinformation in the comments of a news post, don’t reply to it directly - that boosts its visibility. Make a fresh comment, and “like” other accurate comments.

record.text:
As tragic wildfires decimate parts of Alberta, disinformation operations are already swinging into action.

Watch out for claims of "arson" to deflect from the truth - regardless of the immediate cause, wildfires are more frequent and more severe because of #ClimateChange.

Defend the truth.

images.alt:
Disinformation alert! As wildfires rage, disinfo spreads. 

These fires often start from campfires or other human error, and climate change makes them worse and more common.

Trolls, deniers, and comment farms often blame “arson” instead, as a way to deflect.

Defend Truth: When you see disinformation in the comments of a news post, don’t reply to it directly - that boosts its visibility. Make a fresh comment, and “like” other accurate comments.

external.title: Trees reveal climate surprise: bark removes methane from the atmosphere • MUSER PRESS

record.text: While trees have long been known to benefit climate by removing carbon dioxide from the atmosphere, a new research reveals a surprising additional climate benefit. Microbes hidden within tree bark can absorb methane – a powerful greenhouse gas – from the atmosphere. #climatechange #science

external.title: Trees reveal climate surprise: bark removes methane from the atmosphere • MUSER PRESS

record.text:
Awful news and scenes from Jasper, Canada, as a massive forest fire obliterates the area.
I'm looking out at lush native forest in the Australian Blue Mountains, which burned four years ago, wondering how long until we're the headlines again.
#ClimateActionNow #ClimateChange

author.displayName: Patrick Reinsborough ❌👑

external.description: The blazes are still out of control as firefighters try to save as many buildings as possible, officials say.
external.title: Jasper wildfire: Canadian town devastated by fast-moving flames

value.text:
So sad to see this destruction to Jasper and surroundings. I was there in 2018 and residents told me about living with constant fire anxiety & "go bags." 

This is the world fossil capital has knowingly forced us into. It's not too late.  #MakePollutersPay 🔌💡 #ClimateSky www.bbc.com/news/article...
